title: Application to Visa Process Steps for Italy

processSteps.label: University Application with Apostilled docs (25–50 euros/application)
Credential Recognition : CIMIA or DOV : 300 euros
UNIVERSITALY Pre-enrollment (online)
bullets: Mandatory for non-EU · FREE · shows tuition fees · validated by University

processSteps.label: Apostille (MoFA Bangladesh) + Italian translation : all certificates apostilled · English docs usually need no translation

costSteps.label: Accommodation Proof : 500–1000 euros — reservation ≥ 30 days / rental contract / host declaration + ID
Travel / Health Insurance — €150 : medical + hospitalization + repatriation · covers whole stay
One way Air Ticket Booking : 700–1000 euros
Visa File Submission in VFS : D-form + passport (2 blank pages) + 2 ICAO photo

contacts.name: VFS Global — Italy
